headline: Is Waste Management (WM) Fairly Priced After Recent Steady Share Performance?
summary: If you are wondering whether Waste Management's current share price fairly reflects its quality and prospects, this article walks through how the numbers stack up on value. The stock last closed at US$233.10, with returns of 6.7% year to date and 4.5% over the past year, after more modest moves of a 1% decline over both the last 7 and 30 days. Recent attention on the company has focused on its role as a large US commercial services provider in essential waste and recycling operations, an...
